def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = diacritics.sub('', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('\u0640', '')
    # unify hamzas/alifs
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # normalize taa marbuta/ha? maybe not
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

target_full = "إنما بعثت لأتمم مكارم الأخلاق"
target_norm = normalize_arabic(target_full)
target_full, target_norm
